payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial/cropped view of a dark-stained wooden base cabinet with vertical recessed panel doors and a varnished finish; visible scuffing and wear along the lower edge and toe-kick, countertop edge visible at top right of the crop — appears close to the camera (approximately 0.8 m away).

message.content: {"label":"cabinet","short_description":"dark brown paneled base cabinet","long_description":"Partial/cropped view of a dark-stained wooden base cabinet with vertical recessed panel doors and a varnished finish; visible scuffing and wear along the lower edge and toe-kick, countertop edge visible at top right of the crop — appears close to the camera (approximately 0.8 m away).","attributes":["dark brown wood","recessed/paneled doors","varnished finish","scuffed lower edge","base/knee-level cabinet","partial/cropped","countertop edge visible"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.8}
